## Type

## Accessibility Checklist

- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 minimum)
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works correctly
- [ ] `:focus-visible` styles are present
- [ ] ARIA attributes are correct
- [ ] Works with `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`
- [ ] Works in Windows High Contrast Mode
- [ ] Screen reader tested (or not applicable)

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:a11y` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tested in Chrome
- [ ] Tested in Firefox
- [ ] Tested in Safari (if available)

Base branch should be **`main`** (CI runs on `main`).
